objective: Build the High-Signal Mamba Stream as a narrow always-on high-signal channel between session activity and downstream consumers.
delivery_posture: Phase 3 by default; optional Phase 1.5 spike if the post-Phase-1 decision gate says continuity pressure justifies it.

workstreams.name: Production model
outputs: bounded event emission during active sessions

exit_criteria: The stream is produced from session evidence with stable source links.
At least two downstream consumers can use the same semantic stream.
The stream is documented as a rebuildable semantic projection rather than a second authority.
risks: Treating the stream as durable truth instead of a checkpoint surface.
Losing source linkage during optimistic generation.
